ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: (ISPICKVAL( Type_of_Candidate__c , 'Experienced - No break in career') && (Experience__c < 5 || ISBLANK(Experience__c) )) || (ISPICKVAL( Type_of_Candidate__c , 'Experienced - Break career') && (Experience__c < 5 || ISBLANK(Experience__c) ))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Experience should be minimum of 5 years.
